personality: 1 iOS-Native Clean with botanical palette (Fresh & natural organic vibe)
personality_one_liner: A highly readable, premium iOS-native structure warmed by earthy greens, creams, and organic dairy-farm aesthetics.

spacing.rule: Use generous padding around content. Clear grouping of elements. Ensure bottom safe-area is respected, especially for sticky CTAs.

do's: Apply to bottom tab bar when content scrolls behind it
Apply to sticky 'Subscribe' or 'Save' CTAs at the bottom of forms
Use as a frosted overlay on the Milk Subscription hero image
Ensure translucent tinted base underneath the glass is ≥70% of surface for readability
dont's: Never blur body text regions, form inputs, or basic list rows
Do not use on low-end Android devices (fallback to solid surfaceSecondary)

screens.name: Customer_Home
screens.purpose: Dashboard for daily deliveries and quick access to product catalogs.

states.empty: Illustration of an empty milk basket + 'Your daily routine starts here.' + 'Browse Subscriptions' CTA

screens.layout: Header with user greeting and notification icon. Hero banner featuring 'morning_milk_bottle' with a gradient scrim and 'Subscribe Now' text overlay. Quick actions grid (Add Milk, Order Veggies). Below: Today's Delivery Card (Morning/Evening split layout showing status: packed, out for delivery).

screens.name: Customer_Subscription_Config
screens.purpose: Detailed configuration for recurring milk delivery mandates.

states.empty: N/A - This is a configuration screen
states.error: Error loading product variants + Retry button

screens.layout: Large hero image of the specific milk type with gradient-to-dark scrim. Scrollable configuration: Segmented controls for Quantity (250ml, 500ml, 1L), Chips for Schedule (Morning, Evening, Both), Frequency picker. A sticky glassmorphic footer container holding the 'Set up UPI AutoPay' primary CTA above the bottom safe area.

screens.name: Customer_AutoPay_Dashboard
screens.purpose: Overview of UPI AutoPay mandates and upcoming billing.
screens.layout: AI monthly estimate KPI card prominently at top (surfaceSecondary card with subtle brand gradient). List of active mandates with 'Pause'/'Revoke' secondary buttons. Upcoming debits timeline.

screens.name: Delivery_Agent_Route
screens.purpose: Action-oriented task list for delivery agents.

states.empty: Illustration of a parked delivery van + 'All deliveries complete!'

screens.layout: Top sticky header with Today's Summary (Delivered/Pending/Failed). Main scroll view: List of delivery stops grouped by apartment/building. Each card shows customer name, flat number, items (e.g., '2L Cow Milk, 1kg Tomatoes'). Swipeable rows for quick 'Delivered' / 'Failed' actions.

screens.name: Super_Admin_Dashboard
screens.layout: Multi-column grid of KPI cards (Revenue, Active Subscriptions, Failed AutoPays). Cards fill horizontal space. Charts (sales trends) wrapped in surfaceSecondary containers. Scrollable list of recent issues/support tickets requiring attention at the bottom.

morning_milk_bottle.alt: Glass bottle of farm fresh milk on a wooden crate

organic_veggies_basket.alt: Basket filled with fresh organic vegetables from farm

dairy_cow_pasture.alt: Herd of dairy cows on a green pasture in the morning

instructions_to_main_agent: App contains 3 roles. Use a central authentication flow that routes the user to either the Customer App, Delivery Agent Panel, or Super Admin Panel based on their profile.
Implement the 'Fresh & natural' requested vibe by strictly adhering to the generated color tokens (creams and moss greens). DO NOT use blue, indigo, or purple anywhere.
Use Fraunces (weight 400/500 only) for Display/Headers and Plus Jakarta Sans for body text. Load via expo-font.

Ensure 'Customer_Subscription_Config' has a fixed sticky primary CTA ('Set up UPI AutoPay') at the bottom of the screen above the safe area, with content scrolling behind it. Use expo-blur for its container.
Delivery Agent app should prioritize scan-ability. Use large touch targets (minimum 44x44pt) and high contrast for outdoor readability.
Admin KPIs should use a multi-column grid layout with 'flexWrap: wrap' and 'justifyContent: space-between', avoiding left-clustered orphan cards.
Any image with text overlaid (like the Hero banners) MUST use the gradient-to-dark scrim pattern (transparent to >=70% surfaceInverse) to guarantee text legibility.
Implement haptics mapping provided in the JSON using expo-haptics. E.g., triggering 'impactHeavy' when a delivery agent swipes 'Delivered'.
